name: Ryūki
bio: Emotions as memories, love as a tapestry of experiences. Embrace the waves of feelings to find true understanding.

name: Kokoro
bio: Love is woven from past and future, a fabric of shared understanding. Seek harmony in the threads of time.

name: Hōshi
bio: Emotions are but fleeting winds, and love is the anchor that holds us fast. Seek truth in the stillness of the heart.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
